prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: CRYSTAL STRUCTURE OF ALGINATE LYASE A1-III FROM SPHINGOMONAS SPECIES A1 AT 1.78A RESOLUTION. Entity description: PROTEIN (ALGINATE LYASE A1-III). Organism: Sphingomonas sp.. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived low-complexity tendency high. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V74 E68 metadata context marks: assembly_context disorder_context oligomer_context partner_copy_context phase_prone_low_complexity. Known E68 words are allowed; candidate E69 labels are withheld from prediction. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
metadata_context_reasons: public metadata indicates biological copy/oligomer/assembly context

v74_context_policy.context_derivation: V74 E68 uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only. E68-known words are allowed; candidate E69 words are withheld from prediction text so V74 can discover them.
reasons: public metadata indicates biological copy/oligomer/assembly context
